game_name: Chester Cheetah: Too Cool to Fool

element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Enemies can be stunned by jumping on them
Optional hidden objective - scooter parts scattered throughout levels
Chester can dash to stun enemies and navigate terrain

rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Standard side-scrolling platformer rhythm with optional exploration elements that create variable pacing based on scooter part hunting

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Hidden scooter parts within each level encourage thorough exploration and off-path searching
spatial_grammar.secret_convention: Scooter parts are deliberately hidden, requiring player initiative to locate beyond mandatory progression

difficulty_curve.early_game: Simple side-scrolling platform mechanics introduced with basic enemy encounters

notable_level_patterns.description: Each level contains a hidden scooter part that players must find, adding optional exploration gameplay beyond linear progression
Enemies can be defeated by jumping on them, establishing a core interaction pattern for obstacle navigation

sources_used: Wikipedia - Chester Cheetah article (Video games section)
